sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n35060" key="e)naulisth/rios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐναυλ-ιστήριος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n35060.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">habitable</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἄντρον</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.219.13</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (Antip.(?)).</sense> </entryFree>
